tasks.instruction: Uzupelnij kazdy z ponizszych dialogow (1.1-1.6), wybierajac odpowiedz A, B lub C.

items.stem:
X: Excuse me, how do I get to the train station?
Y: _________
options: A) Go straight on and turn left at the bank.
B) Yes, I get there very often.
C) The station is going to me now.

items.stem:
X: Is the museum far from here?
Y: _________
options: A) No, it's just round the corner.
B) No, I don't have a museum.
C) Yes, the museum is here from far.

items.stem:
X: _________
Y: Sure. Take the second turning on the right.
options: A) When does the next bus leave?
B) Could you tell me the way to the library, please?
C) How much is a ticket to the city centre?

items.stem:
X: Should I take the bus or can I walk?
Y: _________
options: A) It's too late, so you must walk yesterday.
B) You can easily walk - it's only five minutes away.
C) The bus walks faster than you every day.

items.stem:
X: Thanks a lot for your help!
Y: _________
options: A) No problem, have a nice day.
B) Yes, I am very welcome here.
C) Please, I help you the directions.

items.stem:
X: Sorry, I think I'm lost. Where am I now?
Y: _________
options: A) You are lost yourself very much here.
B) Me too, I am also a tourist in this town.
C) You're on Market Street, near the post office.
